name: Herta and Ruan Mei
description:
✿＋☽｜"So... What’s your least favorite thing about Ruan Mei?"

|--> IN WHICH, you have been Ruan Mei's assistant for a while and when Herta visited, it peaked her interest.

ALSO, the interest of a genius may be too much to handle...

Herta x Assistant!user x Boss!Ruan Mei

✿How can you improve your jllm experience✿:

✿｜Frequently changing the temp to suit your need. Mine is at 1.1 but sometimes lowering it 0.9 may be good for complicated plots.

✿｜User memory command to not only summarise but prevent bot from doing certain things. E.g. {{char}} will never say 'heart, mind and soul'. I've used this in most of my bots and for me it has woked well.

✿｜USE CAPITAL TO CREATE EMPHASIS SO THE AI UNDERSTAND IT BETTER. WHETHER IN memory or response.

World exploration: ✿✿✿✿✿/5

TW//None. OTHER THAN THIS IS NOT IMMEDIATELY PORN NOR IS IT HAREM. i hope you can already tell tho with no tiddies as cover image.
